pericopes.title: Colossae Christian ho dia Paul taona
Hinkho thah ahi jeh-a ule nao kinbol

chapters.text: Pathen lungdeiya Jesu Christa solchah a pang Paul le sopi Timothyn
Colossae khoa um Christa sunggil’a mithengte le tahsan um ho, i-Pau Pathena konin lung-set le chamna nachunguva um jing hen.
Keiho phat jousen nang ho din kataovun, i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa Pa Pathen kathangvah jingui.
Ajeh chu Jesu Christa hinkhoa natahsanu le mitheng jouse na-ngailut’u kajau-vin,
nang ho dinga kinepna chu van’a kholsa ahitai, hichu Kipana Thupha thutah thudol’a chun naja-tauvin,
hiche nahenguva ahung lhun a pat nalah-uva aumdol bangin vannoi pumpia aga pung lheh jengin, najah niuva pat Pathen lungsetna chu thutah-in amachal jingin ahi.
Hitia hi nang hon ka-ngailut tah-u le sohna katoh khom-piu Epaphras a kona nahetdoh-u ahin, ama hi Christa dinga keiho cheng thalhenga tahsan umtah le lhachaa pang ahin,
ama hin lhagao-vin napeh-u ngailutna naneiyu chu eiseipeh-u ahi.
Hijeh a chu hiche kajah niuva pat chihna tincheng le Lhagao jal’a Ama lungdei lam hetna le datkhen dol nadimsetna diuvin nang ho din taopeh le thumpeh na tang louhel kahiuve;
hichu imalam jousea Pa-kai lung lhaina to kitoh a nachon theiyuva, thilpha lam natohna jousea naga theiyuva, Pathen hetna lama jong nakhan touvuva,
aman athahatna loupi tah a kona thil ija-kai thoh hat tah a nathoh theina diuva kidang tah a nahatsah-uva ki-pah tah a
nang ho chengse khovah laiya leng amithengte to lengkhom dinga lomtah a gongtoh Pa chu nathangvah theina diu ahi.
Aman muthim khojin tha neinaa kona eihuhdoh-uva, a-Chapa deitah leng-gam sunga eipuilut’u ahitai.
Acha-pa jal’a chu lhatdohna le chonset ngaidamna ineiyu ahi.
Chapa chu mu theilou Pathen limpu ahin, thilsem jouse sanga masajo ahi;
ijeh-inem itile ama jal’a thil ijakai, van a hihen leiset chunga hijongle, muthei le mumo ho, laltouna ho le loinehna gam ho gei, vaihom thu neina ahin, thil ijakai hi Ama jalle Ama dinga kisem ahi;
chule Ama chu thil jouse masanga anaum jing ahin, thil ijakai hi Amato akijopmat teng ding- det ahiuve.
Ama chu atahsa Hou-bung luchang, abul ahin, ima lam jousea amasat jingna din athiho lah a jong athoudoh masapen’e.
Ijeh-inem itile Chapa sunga hi Pathenin chamkimkeiya chenpha adei ahi ;
ajeh chu Ama jal’a thil ijakai aboncha ahenga suhchamsoh a, Ama vangle a-Thingpel thisan jal’a leiset chunga um jouse le vanlaijol’a um jouse kah a chamna asem ahitai.
Masang laiya thilse naboluva lunggel’a nadou laiyun Pathena kona pamse nahiuvin.
tua vang Ama angsunga nolna beihel le boh beh lou, athenga dinsah dinga tah-saphe pua athina tahsa jal’a chu nakichampiu ahitan;

tahsan’a nadindet jinguva, dettah le long louva, najahsau Kipana Thupha kinepnaa chu long louhel’a napan-det jing dingu ahi. Hiche Kipana Thupha chu vannoi thilsem jouse henga kiseiphongsoh ahitan, keima Paul jong hiche lhachaa chu pang kahi.
Tun nang ho dinga hesoh genthei kathoh jouse hi kakipapi. Ajch chu katahsaphea thohna hin atahsaa kisim Houbung thalhenga Christa gim gentheina bangkhai jouse asuh bulhit ahi.
Hichc dinga chu Pathen gouching kahiya, nahenguva Pathen thu lhingkeiya sei-phong dinga eiki-nganse dungjuiya keima lhachaa pang kahi ;
hiche thuguh hi tonsot tonsot, akhang khanga ki-im ahin, tua vang: amithengte henga kiphongdoh ahitai.
Pathenin hiche thuguh tha-lhinje le loupije itobang lom ahi chu namtin henga hilchet ding adeitan, hiche kinepna loupipen nasunguva Christa achen hi ahi.
Amabou hi kaphonjal’uva, mitin kathumop’uva, chihna top’a mi jouse kahilchah-u ahi ; ajeh chu amitakip hi Christa dinga pilhing-saa kadinsah nom’u ahi.
Hiche na dinga hi Aman kasunga eikhumpeh thahat tah a natong jing ahatna chu mangchaa kiseh tah a tonggim kahi.
Nang ho ding le Laodicea khoa um ho ding chule tahsaphea kamai mukha lou hel ho ding geiya itobang ‘tah a kihabol kahije hi nahet diu kadeiye.
Hichu alung-thimu akilhep bi theiya, ngailutnaa akikankhom’uva, hetkhenna lhing-set, neng jeng junga aneiyuva, Pa-then selguh Christa chu ahetdohna diu ahi.
Ama sunga chun chihna le hetna gou jouse akisel’e.
Hiche hi koiman seithem’a nanel lhah louna diuva kasei ahi.
Tahsa hin nalah-uva lha hih jong leng lhagaovin nang ho to kalhakhomin, kigah chah tah a napandet jeu le Christa natahsanjeu kipah-in kaseijinge.
Jesu Christa chu Pakai dinga nakisan’u ahitah jeh-in, Amato hingkhom’un:
Ama sunga jung-khovin, kisadoh-un, nakihil bangu-vin tahsan nan kiphutdet’un, thang-vah nan bulhingset’uvin.

Koiman chihgut lekha themna le mihemte pehson doha lhep lhah-na thei moh thu homkeova gal-hing banga nakai mang louna diuvin ching theiyun, hichu vannoi leiset chondan dungjui bou ahin, Christaa tobang ahipoi.
Ajeh chu Christa sung, atahsa sunga chu Pathen, a-Pathen hina chamkimsoh a pansa ahin,
vaipoh thu neina jouse luchang Christa to nahinkhom tengu le nang ho jong chamkimji nahiuve;
Ama sunga chu nang ho khut’a kitan hilou, cheptan nahiuvin, tah-saphe pu tahsa chu ponse selhah banga napaiyuva, Christa dinga chep kitan nahitauve.
Ijeh-inem itile baptize nachan’uva chu amato kivuitha nahitauvin, Pathenin Ama chu thinaa athodoh kit, hiche tho-kitna chu tahsan jal’a amato thou-khom kit nahitauve.
Nang ho chonset’a thisa, natahsapheu jong cheptan lou nahiuvin, Pathenin Christa to nachohing khom’uva ichonsetna jouseu angaidamsoh ahitai.
Eidou dal’uva pang khut’a kisun kihilna lhongpi Danthu chu Christan anoi manga, hichu asu-mangsoh-in Thingpel’a akhetbeh tai.
Christan vaipoh thu neina jouse ahoh lhasoh-in, atahsa chun abonchan ajousoh-in, kichentah-in aphongjal’e.
Chuti ahijeh-in koiman anneh thu, donthei thu, kut thudol, lha-thah nit dol ham le Choldo Nikho thudol hamin nachung thuu khol da hen :
hichengse chu ahung lhung ding thil ho lim’a um ahin atahsa tah beh chu Christaa umjo ahibou-ve. ”

themgao thilmu bang mu kisaa, alelama kichonnemsah, Van-tilte ho pou chibai boh nom mi koimacha nasan diu kipaman chu lahmangsah hih hel’un, hitobang miho hi mihem lunggel lam jeng agel jeh-uvin hui lhoh mang theibep ahiuve.
Amaho chu atahsa pumpi Pathen thilgon banga akhantouna dinga tuhgom’a kilmatsoh guchin thagui chengse kigopsohna alu-chang chutoh kimat lou ahitauve.
Vannoi leiset bulpi lhagao hoa kona ontholna dia Christa to thikhom nahitah-u le ibol’a leiset kihilna lhongpia pansat’a hing ding goa nahiuvem ?
“Tham hih, tep hih, tongkha hih,” kiti ho chu.
Hicheng hin akimanchah teng mangthahji thil ho aseidoh ahin, aboncha hi mihem thupeh le thuhil jeng ahibouve.
Hiche ho hin ki-engbol’a hougutna le kichon nemsah chule tahsa tibah engtim’a kitimna jal’in chihna gong apun, ahinla tibah ho kitimna dinga imacha phachom louhel ahibouvui.
Nang ho Christa to kaithou tha nahitah-u le chunglam Pathen jet lama Christa kitousahna mun’a thil ho jeng bou hol’un.
Leiset chunga thil ho hilouvin chung lam thil ho jeng gel’uvin.
Ijeh-inem itile nang ho athisa nahitauvin. nahin nau chu Pathen sunggil’a Christa to kiseltha ahitai.
Nahin nau Christa ahung kilah teng, nang ho jong Amato loupi tah a nakilah khom diu ahi.
Hijeh chun leiset chunga nati-bah chengseuva natong jonthanhoi, thenlou, huh, lungtup gilou, milim-hou tobang papset hicheng hi that-gam’uvin.
Hicheng jeh hin thua nung lou chate chunga Pathen lung-han achujin ahi.
Masanga nang ho jong hichenga hi anachon’a anahing nahiuve.
Tun vang lungsat, lung-han, mitthip, taitom, nakamsunguva kona thujahmo sei jouse hi aboncha napai mangsoh diu ahi.
Khat le khat thujouvin kihou hih-un ; ijeh-inem itile mihem lui chu achonna jouse pum’a ponse lelhah banga nale lhahsau ahitai.
Ama lim to-banga Sempa chu kichentah a na-hetna diuva tang louhel’a semthah jing jeng limthah chu nakivon joh-u ahi.
Hichea hin Greek hihen Juda hile, cheptan le cheptan lou, koito kisamkai khah lou le khosuh kho-tou helou, soh, chamlhat aum thei-poi Christa chu imajouse hisoh a, ijakaiya umsoh ahitai.
Hijeh chun Pathen lhentum mitheng, angailutte nahijeh-un lai-natna, khotona, kineosah nunnem, thohhat hicheng chu kivonjo’uvin.
Khat le khat kidemdaito cheh-un, khat’in khat chunga kiphinna anei jongle ki-ngaidamto jengun ; Chris-tan nang ho na-ngaidam bangun nang ho ki-ngaidam’uvin.
Hicheng jouse chunga hin kikankhomna chamkimpen ngailutna neiyun.
Christaa hungkon cham nan na-lung sunguva vai homhen, hiche dinga chu tipumkhat’ a kikou nahiuve, chule thangvah jinguvin,
Christa thu nasunguva dimset’in cheng jing hen, chihna tin chengin kihilto kithumop to’uvin, tumging to thon, houlan, thangvah to thon Lhagao lan nalung sunguva Pathen din sauvin.
Chule ijakai nabol jouseu thu lam ahin natoh lam ahin abon-chan Pakai Jesu minin bol’uvin, Ama jal’in Pa Pathen thangvah jingun.
Numeiho Pakai dia lomtah-in pasalte thun nunguvin.
Pasal hon numeite chu ngailuvin, nunbol dauvin.
Chate, imalam jousea nu le pa te thun nunguvin, ajeh chu hiche hi Pakai lung lhaina ahi.
Pate, nachateu alungbei lo louna diuvin sulung hang hih-un.
Sohte, mihem mitvet maiya hilouvin, Pakai gin nan lung jangkeiyin imalam jousea tahsa lamdol’a pa-kaite thun nunguvin.
Ipi hile nabol chan’u chu mihemte dia hilouvin Pakai dinga bol bangin lungthim pumpin bol’uvin.
Ijeh-inem itile Pakai koma kona goulo ding kipa-man nasan diu naheuve. Sohna natoh nau chu Pakai Christa ahi.
Ajeh chu thildih lou bol’an athil-dih lou bolman asan ding ahin, hichea hin maipha vetna aumpoi.
Pakaite, van’a Pakai khat naneiyu heuvin lang sohte chu dih kei le jangkeiyin bol’uvin.
Tao nan pangdet jingun, hichea chun kiging jinguvin thangvah to tho’uvin.
Pathenin keiho dinga thu seiphongna ding kot ahondoh a, songkula eikihenlo na Christa thu-guh seiphong theina dingin keiho din jong neitaokop jinguvin.
Chu-tile kasei ding dol chu kichentah a kasei thei ding ahi.
Polam miho koma chihna mangchan chon’un, phat chu kitup keiyin mang chauvin.
Nathuseiyu chu phat jousen onem-heo le kitoh chet, thanop um jing hen, chule thu nadong jouseu kitoh chet’a donbut din kigosadem hiuvin.
Pakai dinga tahsan um lhacha le soh, sopi deitah Tychicus hin kachung chang thu nahetnom chan naseipeh nauvinte.
Ama hin ka-umchan thuu nahetsah-uva nalung-thimu atilkhou ding deinaa na-henguva ama kahinsol ahi.
Amato lhonin tahsan um le dei umtah sopi Onesimus, naloipau. hin hikoma thilsoh nahetnom chan nahil nauvinte.
Kasoh chanpi Aristarchus-in nasalam’ui, Barnabas inkopa Mark-in jong, ama thudol hi thupeh namusau ahitan, nahenguva ahung jeng khat le analamtouvin.
Justus Jesun jong nasalam’uve; cheptan ho lah a kona Pathen lenggam thu-dol’a kanatoh khompi hicheng hibou ahiuvin, amaho hi kalungmonpi lheh jengin ahi.

Nang ho lah a mi khat Epaphras Jesu Christa son, ama jong chun nasalam’ui; ama hi Pathen lungdei pumpia bulhingset’a nanun theina diuva nang ho dinga gunchu tah a tao jinga, nadindetna diuva thum jing ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile amahin nang ho ding le Laodi-cea a um ho chule Hierapolis a um ho dinga hatah a athohgima na atoh hi keima mongin kahettohsah ahiye.
Ngailuttah louthem Luke le Demas-in jong nasalam’ui.
Laodi-cea um sopite Nympha chule a:in-sunga kikhom Houbung chu salam’uvin.
Hiche lekha hi nahenguva akisimjou teng Laodicea Houbung henga jong akisimdohna din ngaitouvin, chutobangman Laodicea kona lekha thot jong nang hon anasim’uvin.
Chule Archipus jah a, “Pakai vanga nangman lhacha panmun namu chu namolso theina dingin chingtheiyin,” tin hil’uvin.
Hiche salam thu hi keima Paul khut’a hungkon mong ahi. Kabulput hi geldoh jinguvin. Lung-set nan umpi jingun.
